items.name: MahirK7-FinalYearProject_F1NN-MonteCarlo_P2725883
items.description: Final Year Project - An Integrated Data Engineering & Machine Learning Framework  for Formula 1 Race Strategy Simulation. Strategies are benchmarked against real 2025 races for comparison.
